name: polymath-connector-vercel
description: Vercel connector: MCP for projects/deployments/logs + inspect-deployment skill that classifies a deployment as healthy/degraded/broken with rollback guidance.

vercelToken.title: Vercel access token
vercelToken.description: From Vercel → Account Settings → Tokens. Team-scoped preferred over user-scoped.

vercelTeamId.title: Default Vercel team ID
vercelTeamId.description: Team ID (team_…) for default scoping. Personal accounts can omit.
